entity.dracolotl.dracolotl.description: An amphibious yet aerial neutral mob that is automatically tamed by the player who hatched it from a Dragon Egg. Has a slim chance to produce more Dragon Eggs when fed Chorus Flowers. The absolute most adorable apex predator one could dream of having as a companion.
item.dracolotl.bucket_of_dracolotl.descr: A bucket with a Dracolotl inside. §oThis vessel cannot contain him forever.
